name: Michelle Khare
oneLine: American host and former pro cyclist behind the documentary challenge series Challenge Accepted.
bio: Michelle Khare is an American YouTuber, television host and stunt performer who was previously a professional cyclist and a BuzzFeed video producer. She is the co-creator (with Garrett Kennell) and host of Challenge Accepted, a documentary-style web series that premiered on YouTube in May 2018 in which she trains for and attempts intense physical and mental challenges. The show has won the Streamy Award for Best Unscripted Series (2022) and Show of the Year (2023), surpassed 5 million subscribers, and joined the Primetime Emmy ballot for outstanding hosted nonfiction series.
notable: I Trained Like an NFL Combine Athlete
